outfit_info.outfit_description: A comfortable yet refined ensemble features a classic logo denim jacket layered over a forest green long-sleeve polo. Dark navy cotton-blend sweatpants offer relaxed appeal, complemented by rich brown suede boots. The look combines utilitarian elements with smart casual comfort, ideal for cool-weather adventures and a rustic backdrop.

model_attributes.body: Young, slender male with a neat, short haircut, standing upright with a calm, composed demeanor and direct gaze.
model_attributes.pose: Model stands front-facing, with hands relaxed at the sides, maintaining a steady and symmetrical posture, looking directly at the viewer.
model_attributes.background: Features ancient, ruined stone arches against a dramatic twilight sky, with falconry stands, birds, and an attendant nearby, creating an evocative scene.
